name: io.github.MarvelNwachukwu/mcp-pear
description: MCP server for Pear Protocol: markets, positions, orders, portfolio, and gated trade execution.

environmentVariables.name: PEAR_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Pear API key for authenticated read/write tools (single-user mode). Public tools work without it.

environmentVariables.name: PEAR_ADDRESS
environmentVariables.description: Wallet address (0x...) bound to PEAR_API_KEY. Required alongside PEAR_API_KEY.

environmentVariables.name: PEAR_JWT
environmentVariables.description: Pre-minted Pear JWT for multi-tenant orchestrators (JWT pass-through mode). Used directly when set.

environmentVariables.name: PEAR_REFRESH_TOKEN
environmentVariables.description: Refresh token so the server refreshes an expired JWT itself instead of requiring a restart.

environmentVariables.name: PEAR_TRADE_ENABLED
environmentVariables.description: Set to 'true' to enable the write/trade-execution tools. Off by default.
